if not __backend__.get("ida_available"):
    raise RuntimeError("IDA backend required for ida.api_helpers")
functions = ai.functions()
if not functions:
    raise RuntimeError("function enumeration returned no records")
ea = functions[0]["ea"]
__result__ = __artifact_store__.write_json("inventory/api_helpers.json", {"segments": ai.segments(), "entries": ai.entries(), "exports": ai.exports(), "bytes": ai.bytes_hex(ea, 16), "comments": ai.comments(ea), "type": ai.type_at(ea), "operand0": ai.operand_value(ea, 0), "cfg": ai.cfg(ea)})

if not __backend__.get("ida_available"):
    raise RuntimeError("IDA backend required for ida.cache_persist")
ai.refresh_cache()
path = str(__artifact_store__.run_dir / "artifacts" / "cache" / "persistent.json")
saved = ai.save_cache(path)
loaded = ai.load_cache(path)
__result__ = {"saved": saved, "loaded_status": loaded["status"]}
